name: Kootenay Silver Inc.
description: Kootenay Silver Inc. is a Canadian and Mexican based silver exploration company actively engaged in the development of several major exploration stage silver projects in Mexico. The company's flagship project, Columba, is located in Chihuahua, Mexico, alongside other resource properties including La Cigarra and Promontorio-La Negra. Kootenay Silver maintains one of the largest junior-owned silver asset bases in Mexico, with a significant portfolio of measured, indicated, and inferred silver resources. The company is currently focused on core drilling to further define its resource estimates and advancing its projects toward economic assessment and future production.
